message.content:
| Distribution | Support | PDF (rendered inline LaTeX) | PDF as literal text (verbatim, not rendered) |
|-------------|---------|-----------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Normal \(N(\mu,\sigma^2)\) | \(x \in \mathbb{R}\) | \(f(x) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \exp\!\left(-\frac{(x-\mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}\right)\) | `\(f(x) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \exp\!\left(-\frac{(x-\mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}\right)\)` |
| Exponential \(\text{Exp}(\lambda)\) | \(x \ge 0\) | \(f(x) = \lambda e^{-\lambda x}\) | `\(f(x) = \lambda e^{-\lambda x}\)` |
| Uniform \(\text{Unif}(a,b)\) | \(a \le x \le b\) | \(f(x) = \frac{1}{b-a}\) | `\(f(x) = \frac{1}{b-a}\)` |
